headline_marked: Finance Minister arrives in Parliament for [[Bangladesh's first budget under BNP govt]]
headline: Finance Minister arrives in Parliament for Bangladesh's first budget under BNP govt
summary: Bangladesh's Finance Minister has arrived at Parliament to present the nation's first budget under the BNP government. The budget aims to fulfill the aspirations of the people.
details: The Finance Minister has reached the Parliament building to present the budget for the fiscal year. This marks the first budget to be presented under the leadership of Tarique Rahman's government.
The government has stated that this budget is designed to meet the nation's aspirations and expectations. It is expected to focus on controlling inflation and boosting investment.

Discussions are underway regarding potential tax exemptions on approximately 60 essential commodities and other benefits for consumers. The budget aims to provide relief and stimulate economic activity.

This budget is being presented in the context of challenges faced by the microfinance sector and aims to address them. The government is also looking at measures to increase sales of technology products and stabilize component prices.
caption:
Bangladesh's Finance Minister is set to present the first budget under the BNP government today.
The budget aims to fulfill national aspirations and boost the economy.

The Finance Minister has reached the Parliament building to present the budget for the fiscal year. This marks the first budget to be presented under the leadership of Tarique Rahman's government.

The government has stated that this budget is designed to meet the nation's aspirations and expectations. It is expected to focus on controlling inflation and boosting investment.

Discussions are underway regarding potential tax exemptions on approximately 60 essential commodities and other benefits for consumers. The budget aims to provide relief and stimulate economic activity.

This budget is being presented in the context of challenges faced by the microfinance sector and aims to address them. The government is also looking at measures to increase sales of technology products and stabilize component prices.

#BangladeshBudget #BNP #TariqueRahman #Economy #FiscalYear

Source: Somoy News, Prothom Alo
tweet: Finance Minister arrives in Parliament to present Bangladesh's first budget under the BNP govt, led by Tarique Rahman. The budget aims to fulfill national aspirations and boost the economy. #BangladeshBudget #BNP

headline_marked: FIFA World Cup 2026: [[Football fever grips nations]] ahead of kickoff
headline: FIFA World Cup 2026: Football fever grips nations ahead of kickoff
summary: Fans worldwide are gearing up for the FIFA World Cup 2026, with celebrations and merchandise sales soaring. The tournament is set to begin in just a few hours.
details: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is set to commence in a matter of hours, igniting football fever across the globe. Enthusiasts are already immersed in pre-tournament celebrations, expressing their passion through team jerseys and flags.

Supporters are flocking to sports merchandise stores to purchase jerseys of their favorite players, indicating a significant surge in demand. The overall atmosphere is one of festive excitement as the world prepares to welcome the biggest football event.
Millions of fans are ready to embrace the tournament, with the opening whistle of the world's premier football competition eagerly awaited.
caption:
The FIFA World Cup 2026 is almost here! Football fever is already spreading worldwide with fans celebrating their favorite teams and players.

The FIFA World Cup 2026 is set to commence in a matter of hours, igniting football fever across the globe. Enthusiasts are already immersed in pre-tournament celebrations, expressing their passion through team jerseys and flags.

Supporters are flocking to sports merchandise stores to purchase jerseys of their favorite players, indicating a significant surge in demand. The overall atmosphere is one of festive excitement as the world prepares to welcome the biggest football event.

Millions of fans are ready to embrace the tournament, with the opening whistle of the world's premier football competition eagerly awaited.

#FIFAWorldCup2026 #FootballFever #WorldCup #Soccer #Sports

Source: Prothom Alo, Jamuna TV, Somoy News
tweet: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is almost here! Football fever is already spreading worldwide with fans celebrating their favorite teams and players. Get ready for the kickoff! #FIFAWorldCup2026 #Football
source: Prothom Alo, Jamuna TV, Somoy News
